middleware.description: Resolves the caller's active Season for THIS request. Reads (in order): (1) `X-Season-Id` header when the caller's active tenant has a Season on that slug or ULID AND the Season is not archived; (2) CurrentSeasonResolver -> the tenant's Season where is_current=true within the scope-tuple fallback chain (see readme.md §6); (3) null when no season matches (allowed — Small tier + always-on tenants operate here). Sets `Request::activeSeason()` + writes to the `RequestContext.season_id` slot that downstream middleware (season.enforce_registration_open) reads. Runs AFTER `tenant.resolve` but BEFORE any enrollment-adjacent middleware.

responses.condition: X-Season-Id header points at a Season in a different tenant
responses.description: Security-relevant — a forged header attempting to reach another tenant's Season. Logged with the tenant + user + attempted season + IP.

responses.condition: X-Season-Id header points at an archived Season
responses.description: Season exists but has been archived. Response includes the current is_current=true Season's id as a hint (when one exists in the resolved tuple).

responses.condition: No X-Season-Id header AND no current season resolved AND Wave 3 enrollment-adjacent route
responses.description: Middleware sets Request::activeSeason() = null and lets the request proceed. Downstream `season.enforce_registration_open` middleware surfaces the specific error if it applies. Tenants with no active season legitimately use the always-on scheduling flow.

middleware.description: Guards enrollment-adjacent write routes (Wave 3 athlete-enrollment surface — this module ships the middleware today so Wave 3 can compose it without a follow-up). Refuses when the resolved active Season's registration window is closed. Not auto-applied — Wave 3 enrollment routes attach it explicitly.

responses.condition: Request::activeSeason() is null (no season resolved AND route requires one)
responses.description: Failed dependency — the route requires an active season and none is resolved for the caller's scope. Response includes suggestions to create a Season or promote an existing one to current.
Retryable when the window opens. Response includes registration_opens_at.

responses.condition: now() > season.registration_closes_at AND (allows_late_registration=false OR now() > late_registration_ends_at)
responses.description: Response includes the closest window (season_id + registration_opens_at) when a future Season with an open window exists in the tuple.

responses.condition: In late window AND caller lacks `seasons.enroll.late` permission
responses.description: Late enrollments require the explicit permission (typically granted to admin + reception roles who handle surcharge collection).
